packages.name: repo-harness
packages.summary: Root router Skill; canonical entrypoint synced unconditionally to both hosts regardless of install profile.

packages.name: repo-harness-setup
packages.summary: Canonical rule owner for installing, migrating, upgrading, repairing, scaffolding, and capability-configuring the repo-harness workflow in a repository. Router-only progressive load; never auto-discovered by a profile.

packages.name: repo-harness-plan
packages.summary: Interactive planning entrypoint for repo-local agentic development work: creates an approved plan before implementation, and reviews an existing plan across product, engineering, design, and DevEx dimensions.

packages.name: repo-harness-check
packages.summary: Runs the repo-local harness verification gate and reports pre-merge or release readiness, including a deploy-readiness reference for deployment and operations configuration checks.

packages.name: repo-harness-product
packages.summary: Canonical rule owner for PRD drafting, Sprint planning/execution, and native Goal-session preparation from repo-harness planning artifacts.

packages.name: repo-harness-ship
packages.summary: Validates finished worktrees, commits through finish --no-merge, pushes branches, and creates GitHub PRs by default.

packages.name: repo-harness-architecture
packages.summary: Resolves architecture drift requests and updates architecture docs or diagrams without refreshing the harness. Router-only or explicit install; never implied by another profile.

packages.name: repo-harness-cross-review
packages.summary: Host-aware opposite-provider review skill: deterministic scope capture, provider invocation, timeout, and transcript recovery live in Core/Effects/CLI; the Skill owns mode selection (Claude vs. Codex) and finding interpretation only. Installed on both hosts for strict.

packages.name: merge-gate
packages.summary: Classification-only entry for the strict-profile discovery matrix's 'merge-gate on gatekeeper host' row. repo-harness ships no merge-gate SKILL.md and ships no runtime projection for it; empty hosts/profiles keep this entry non-selectable by every catalog selector. See docs/reference-configs/external-tooling.md for the authoritative statement that runtime setup installs no merge-gate skill.

packages.name: repo-harness-chatgpt
packages.summary: Canonical rule owner for repo-harness ChatGPT integration: Oracle-first browser/GPT Pro consult and continuation, MCP Connector setup, MCP bridge planning handoff, and Connector invocation read-back evidence. Additive only after an explicit ChatGPT setup action; never implied by product-planning or any other profile.

packages.name: claude-plan
packages.summary: External-brain plan consult skill: headless Claude plan mode reviews a Codex plan/decision brief. Installed on the Codex host.

packages.name: think
packages.summary: Waza planning skill: turns rough ideas into approved, decision-complete plans. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: hunt
packages.summary: Waza root-cause debugging skill. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: check
packages.summary: Waza review/audit skill for diffs, PRs, and release readiness. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: health
packages.summary: Waza project-audit skill. Fetched from tw93/Waza via bunx skills add.

packages.name: mermaid
packages.summary: Diagram-design skill. Fetched from BfdCampos/dotfiles via bunx skills add.

retiredPackages.name: repo-harness-review
retiredPackages.note: Consolidated into repo-harness-plan's review reference; plan and review share the same non-mutating planning surface.

retiredPackages.name: repo-harness-handoff
retiredPackages.note: Folds into the root router's own reference surface (references/handoff.md) rather than surviving as an independently discoverable facade.

retiredPackages.name: repo-harness-autoplan
retiredPackages.note: Retired with no successor facade. Root execute already follows Effective State and the existing plan -> contract -> worktree -> verify -> ship machinery; no invented workflow run --mode autoplan engine. The Reusable Workflow Packaging Rubric survives alone as references/workflow-packaging-rubric.md.

retiredPackages.name: codex-review
retiredPackages.note: Consolidated into repo-harness-cross-review's codex-mode reference; installed on the Claude host.

retiredPackages.name: claude-review
retiredPackages.note: Consolidated into repo-harness-cross-review's claude-mode reference; installed on the Codex host.

retiredPackages.name: repo-harness-chatgpt-bridge
retiredPackages.note: Consolidated into repo-harness-chatgpt's bridge reference. The installed runtime skill name repo-harness-chatgpt-bridge remains the canonical bridge.md-frontmatter-driven projection identity for the MCP connector, generated on demand rather than shipped as a static directory.

retiredPackages.name: repo-harness-chatgpt-browser
retiredPackages.note: Consolidated into repo-harness-chatgpt's continue reference. The underlying browser/session CLI engine at src/cli/chatgpt-browser survives unchanged, documented at docs/repo-harness-chatgpt-browser-engine.md.
